Notes: Probe how the server handles an UPDATE that adds an A RR to an existing RRset with a different TTL than the preexisting member.

Steps.Description: Add x.campus.edu. A 192.0.2.41 with TTL 60 to the existing x.campus.edu. A RRset whose current member has TTL 300.

Steps.Name: x.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe the post-update RRset and answer code.
